name: krystiangrzyb-fotograf
description: Strona fotografa okolicznosciowego Krystian Grzyb (osiemnastki i imprezy)

scripts.deploy:all: node build-static.js && cross-env FTP_CMS=1 node ftp-deploy.js
scripts.postinstall: playwright install chromium --with-deps 2>/dev/null || playwright install chromium || true
